mapper.sql: id, room_id, version_no, is_current, title, content_md, status, publish_by, publish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delflag
mapper.select:
select c.id, c.room_id, concat(ifnull(b.room_num, ''), ifnull(r.room_num, '')) as roomName, c.version_no, c.title, c.content_md, c.status, u.real_name as publishBy, c.publish_time, u2.real_name as updateBy, coalesce(c.update_time, c.create_time) as updateTime from dm_convention c join room_student rs on rs.room_id = c.room_id and rs.student_id = #{studentId} and rs.is_current = 1 left join dormitory r on r.id = c.room_id and r.delflag = 0 and r.parent_id != '${@cloud.ciky.base.constant.SystemConstants@ROOT_NODE_ID}' left join dormitory b on b.id = r.parent_id and b.delflag = 0 and b.parent_id = '${@cloud.ciky.base.constant.SystemConstants@ROOT_NODE_ID}' left join dm_system.sys_user u on u.id = c.publish_by and u.delflag = 0 left join dm_system.sys_user u2 on u2.id = coalesce(c.update_by, c.create_by) and u2.delflag = 0 where c.delflag = 0
and c.id = #{conventionId}
and c.is_current = 1
order by c.version_no desc limit 1

select c.id, c.version_no, c.title, c.status, c.publish_time, su1.real_name as publishBy, coalesce(c.update_time, c.create_time) as updateTime, coalesce(c.update_by, c.create_by) as updateUserId, su2.real_name as updateBy from dm_convention c left join dm_system.sys_user su1 on su1.id = c.publish_by and c.publish_by IS NOT NULL left join dm_system.sys_user su2 on su2.id = coalesce(c.update_by, c.create_by) where c.delflag = 0 and c.room_id = #{roomId} order by case c.status when 1 then 1 when 0 then 2 when 2 then 3 else 4 end, c.version_no desc, coalesce(c.update_time, c.create_time) desc
